MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO REOPEN DISCOVERY AND SHORTEN TIME FOR CONDUCTING A DEFENSE MEDICAL EXAMINATION (TRANSACTION ID # 67304753) FILED BY DEFENDANT RMR CONSTRUCTION COMPANY

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-08-2022 IN 206, DEFENDANT RMR CONSTRUCTION COMPANY'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE AND TRIAL RELATED DEADLINES. ALEXANDRA HAMILTON, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. P. CHRISTIAN SCHELEY, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT VIA COURTCALL. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE AND GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 3/21/22 IS VACATED AND THE NEW TRIAL DATE IS 5/16/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL DISCOVERY SHALL TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION WHICH IS IN VIOLATION OF SF LOCAL RULE 2.7B. THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO PAY $60.00 FILING FEE (VIA E-FILING) FOR THE CONTINUANCE WHICH IS THE COST FOR FILING PAPERS THAT DEFENDANT WOULD HAVE TO FILE AGAIN WITH A COURTESY COPY IN ORDER TO GET THE 5/16/22 TRIAL DATE. MR. SCHELEY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1312. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reopen Discovery And Shorten Time For Conducting A Defense Medical Examination
Off Calendar Feb-25-2022 Continued To Mar-03-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ALEXANDRA A. HAMILTON, Esq. of Fiore Achermann (Tel: 415-550-0650) for plaintiffs;
Atty. KAVEH MIRSHAFIEI, Esq. of Clapp Moroney Vucinich Beeman & Scheley (Tel: 650-989-5400) for defendant RMR Construction Company.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT RMR CONSTRUCTION COMPANY's Motion To Reopen Discovery And Shorten Time For Conducting A Defense Medical Examination.

Defendant does not stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge.

Matter discussed.

Matter is continued to March 3, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. (There is a trial date set in this case for March 21, 2022 and a hearing on motion for trial continuance set for March 8, 2022.)

Pro tem judge to prepare and submit a report and recommendation at least three court days prior to the hearing date.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
